channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-05
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting progress across multiple projects. The `scienceverse/metacheck` project has made significant strides on its `data_check` branch, with numerous commits addressing bug fixes, adding an archive report, and enhancing feedback mechanisms. Notably, the updates to the OSF download functionality will improve user experience and streamline data management. Meanwhile, the `JamieCummins/regcheck` project has removed its sign-up feature, a deliberate design choice that may influence how users interact with the repository. As our projects continue to evolve, we celebrate the connections between them, such as the shared focus on data management and user experience. By working together and building upon each other's advancements, we're fostering a robust and collaborative research ecosystem.

74 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck31 commits
metacheck19 commits
regcheck14 commits
escicheck6 commits
statcheck2 commits

item.title: metacheck: 4 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `data_check` branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. Specifically, bugs were fixed, an archive report was added, large GitHub repositories were gated, and feedback was improved, as stated in one of the commits. Another commit updated the OSF download functionality on the `data_check` branch. The `data_check` branch also saw updates to its functions, with bugs being fixed, according to a separate commit. Additionally, a commit mentioned "improvements", but another commit on the same `data_check` branch provided more detail, such as fixing bugs, adding an archive report, and other changes, which may be related to the mentioned "improvements".

4 commit(s) today:

  • 0c8303d [data_check] fix bugs, add archive report, gate large github repos, improve feedback — Lakens
  • 2615ab2 [data_check] updates osf download — Lakens
  • 58122ed [data_check] updates to functions, fix bugs — Lakens
  • ad4cb14 [data_check] improvements — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the remote repository. The merge commit was made to integrate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, administrative updates were made, as described in the commit message "admin updates". No other branches were mentioned in the provided commit messages, indicating that all recent work was focused on `feature-non-apa-newer`. The commit messages do not provide details on the specific administrative updates that were made.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
